titles.en: Chapter on the Reason for the Two Patches on the Palms of the animal's Feet
Chapter on the Reason for the Two Patches on the Palms of the animal's Feet

segments: : قُلْتُ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ نَرَى اَلدَّوَابَّ فِي بُطُونِ أَيْدِيهَا مِثْلُ اَلرُّقْعَتَيْنِ فِي بَاطِنِ يَدَيْهَا مِثْلُ اَلْكَيِّ فَأَيُّ شَيْءٍ هُوَ قَالَ «ذَلِكَ مَوْضِعُ مَنْخِرَيْهِ فِي بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ.
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ نَرَى اَلدَّوَابَّ فِي بُطُونِ أَيْدِيهَا مِثْلُ اَلرُّقْعَتَيْنِ فِي بَاطِنِ يَدَيْهَا مِثْلُ اَلْكَيِّ فَأَيُّ شَيْءٍ هُوَ قَالَ «ذَلِكَ مَوْضِعُ مَنْخِرَيْهِ فِي بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ.

segments:
Hadith.2476 - Hammad ibn Uthman narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
I said to him, "May I be your ransom! We see markings on the undersides of the forelegs of animals, like two patches or brands. What is that?"
Imam (as) replied: "That is the place where their nostrils were positioned while they were in their mother's womb."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2476 - Hammad ibn Uthman narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
I said to him, "May I be your ransom! We see markings on the undersides of the forelegs of animals, like two patches or brands. What is that?"
Imam (as) replied: "That is the place where their nostrils were positioned while they were in their mother's womb."

narratorChain.raw: 2476 - رَوَى حَمَّادُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
